indications.text: All the Convolvulus family have purgative properties in a greater or less degree. Convolvulus Scammonia is used in homoeopathy. A tincture is made from the gum resin. The drugs known as Jalap and Scammony are produced from the Jalap Bindweed and the C. Scammonia . There are three kinds of Convolvulus or Bindweed in our native flora: the Field, Hedge, and the Sea Convolvulus. We have also many southern species growing in our gardens, chief among which are the handsome Morning Glory ( Ipomea purpurea Linn.), C. purpureus , a native of Asia and America, with large purple flowers, and the pretty little annual, C. minor , a native of southern Europe, its cheerful flowers a combination of blue, yellow and white.
